name: &gA&mnother &GD&mimension&n
description:
&nYou are in a strange dimension. You should not be here if you don't have the
&WU&wt&Wh&wa &WS&wp&Wi&wr&Wi&Wt&n, the Spirit of the Shamans.
When you look around, you can see thousands of ancient shamans that would love
to share some experience with you.
This dimension, or some parts of it, is used like a armoury by the experienced
shamans, which leave their war equipments here. This corner of this dimension
is used by &mM&mark &cKazhisky&n, who loves to rest in his bed and drink some
cold bear when he is not seeking for the evil mage that hold his mother in its
power.
